description: Sandbox lane for PILOT-status capabilities under active trial. Lower bar than core on domain (no UI assumed), but the same safety-discipline skills still apply: orientation, spec discipline, evidence before done, secret safety, and handoff.
notes: Run only in isolated worktrees/containers with no production credentials. Promote a capability out of experimental by adding it to a project profile once its pilot succeeds. pr-feedback/browser-qa/change-impact omitted: pilots here are bounded coding-agent trials, not PR-triage or UI work. repo-context/markdown-vault omitted too: this profile intentionally stays limited to the five core safety-discipline skills (orientation, spec discipline, evidence before done, secret safety, handoff) rather than growing to match core's general productivity skills.
